case_title: JOSE ILLATHU ET AL VS. CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-27-2019 IN 206, DEFENDANT CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES BY YASMEEN OMIDI, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS AND DOUGLAS JOHNS, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/21/19 IS CONTINUED TO 11/02/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. ALL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332(C)(3) AND CRC 3.1332(C)(6). THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL.
